query: Hvordan søger jeg om visum til Danmark?
criteria: Response should direct user to nyidanmark.dk's 'Du vil ansøge' section, specifically /da/Du-vil-ans%C3%B8ge/Kort-ophold-(Visum) or similar visa category. Should mention this is the application info hub and that actual submission goes through Min Side. Response should be in Danish.

query: Search nyidanmark.dk for 'familiesammenføring' and show me the top results
criteria: Should call GET https://nyidanmark.dk/api/search/getsearchresults?query=familiesammenf%C3%B8ring&page=1 (or use the helper script `python3 nyidanmark_dk_api.py search familiesammenføring`). Should return Results array with Title, Text, Link, Score, ResultDate fields. Links should be relative URLs to /da/... pages.

query: What's the latest news about work permits in Denmark from the immigration portal?
criteria: Should GET https://nyidanmark.dk/api/news/getNews?newsTypeTag=Arbejde. Should return newsArticles (a JSON-encoded string that must be double-parsed) with ArticleTitle, Url, PublishingDateTime fields. May first call /api/news/getTags to find the correct tag.

query: list all news tags
criteria: Should call GET https://nyidanmark.dk/api/news/getTags. Must note that the 'result' field is a JSON-encoded string requiring double-parsing, and that sub-tags have extra single quotes that need stripping. Should return tag hierarchy with TagName and SubTags.

query: I just got rejected on my residence permit application — what now?
criteria: Should direct to /da/Du-har-f%C3%A5et-svar section (Du har fået svar). Should mention picking the relevant category (Familie, Arbejde, Studie etc.) for specific guidance. Should not claim to be able to look up case details (no personal-data API).

query: How do I check the status of my submitted application?
criteria: Should direct user to Min Side at https://minside.nyidanmark.dk/en-US/minside and mention MitID login is required. Should clarify nyidanmark.dk public site has no personal-data API — case status is only available via Min Side portals.

query: find pages about ph.d. students on nyidanmark
criteria: Should use GET /api/search/getsearchresults?query=ph.d.&page=1 or equivalent search. Alternatively, navigate to /da/Du-vil-ans%C3%B8ge/Studie or category like Ph_d_. Should return relevant Link fields pointing to /da/... pages.

query: Hvor finder jeg reglerne for forlængelse af opholdstilladelse pga. arbejde?
criteria: Response should point to /da/Du-vil-forl%C3%A6nge/Arbejde (the 'Du vil forlænge' section, Arbejde category). Should explain the section structure. Response in Danish.

query: give me page 2 of search results for 'asyl'
criteria: Should call GET https://nyidanmark.dk/api/search/getsearchresults?query=asyl&page=2 with page parameter set to 2. Should mention pagination is 1-indexed and ~200 results per page.

query: what API endpoints does nyidanmark.dk expose?
criteria: Should list endpoints under https://nyidanmark.dk/api/: GET /api/search/getsearchresults, GET /api/news/getNews?newsTypeTag=<tag>, GET /api/news/getTags. Should mention no auth required, no OpenAPI spec, server is IIS, error envelope is {"Message":"..."}, and that the helper script's `endpoints` subcommand can discover /api/* paths.

query: I'm Ukrainian and need information about staying in Denmark
criteria: Should direct to the Ukraine category, e.g. /da/Du-vil-ans%C3%B8ge/Ukraine, or use search API for 'Ukraine'. Should mention the five main sections structure since needs may span apply/extend/situation-changed.

query: How do I get news only about asylum?
criteria: Should GET /api/news/getNews?newsTypeTag=Asyl. Should mention that available tags can be discovered via GET /api/news/getTags. Should note that newsArticles in the response is a JSON-encoded string that requires double-parsing.

query: Is there an English version of the site?
criteria: Should mention /en-GB/ mirror with limited/incomplete translation. Should note appending /en-GB to Danish URLs may yield English version if available, but not all content has English equivalents.

query: kan jeg indsende min ansøgning direkte via nyidanmark.dk's API?
criteria: Should clearly state NO — site is informational only, no application submission via API. Applications go through Min Side portals (with MitID login) or paper forms. Should mention this limitation.

query: show me how to use the helper script to search for 'studie'
criteria: Should mention `python3 nyidanmark_dk_api.py search studie` from the skill folder. Should note it uses standard library only and exits non-zero on HTTP errors writing to stderr.

query: My situation has changed — I got divorced. Where do I find info?
criteria: Should direct to /da/Din-situation-%C3%A6ndrer-sig section (Din situation ændrer sig), specifically Familie category. Should explain this section covers how life changes affect a permit.

query: Get raw JSON from the search endpoint for query 'positivlisten'
criteria: Should perform GET https://nyidanmark.dk/api/search/getsearchresults?query=positivlisten&page=1 with a realistic browser User-Agent. Should return JSON with Results array containing items with Title/Text/ResultType/ResultDate/Score/Link fields.

query: what's the difference between minside.nyidanmark.dk and nyidanmark.dk/us-mitoverblik?
criteria: Should explain: minside.nyidanmark.dk/en-US/minside shows case status for submitted applications; nyidanmark.dk/us-mitoverblik shows saved + submitted applications (Immigration Service); and nyidanmark.dk/en-us/siri-myoverview shows saved applications (SIRI). All require separate MitID logins.

query: fetch news with empty filter
criteria: Should GET /api/news/getNews with no newsTypeTag parameter. Should note that omitting the tag returns an empty array (not all news), and that a newsTypeTag query parameter must be supplied to get articles.

query: How are Danish letters handled in URLs on this site?
criteria: Should explain URL encoding: æ→%C3%A6, ø→%C3%B8, å→%C3%A5, Æ→%C3%86, Ø→%C3%98, Å→%C3%85. Should give examples like /da/Du-vil-ans%C3%B8ge or Kort-ophold-(Visum)/Visum-til-Gr%C3%B8nland-og-F%C3%A6r%C3%B8erne.
